scripts.build: cd packages/shared && npm run build && cd ../.. && cd apps/server && npm run build && cd ../.. && cd apps/client && npm run build && cd ../..
scripts.build:client: cd packages/shared && npm run build && cd ../../apps/client && npm run build
scripts.build:vercel: cd packages/shared && npm run build && cd ../../apps/client && npm run build
scripts.build:server: cd packages/shared && npm run build && cd ../../apps/server && npm run build
